elements.text: You are in class on the first day of school and reach to put your phone away as the professor starts talking. Your professor mistakes this for you texting during class and calls you out in front of the whole class. You go up to apologize after class and you can't read your professor's...

elements.name: misunderstanding--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
